title: createSignal
description: Creates a reactive signal with a getter and setter.
signature:
createSignal<T>(): [Accessor<T | undefined>, Setter<T | undefined>]
createSignal<T>(value: T, options?: SignalOptions<T>): [Accessor<T>, Setter<T>]
param_value_desc: Initial value of the signal. Optional; omit for T | undefined.
param_options_desc: Optional. Set equals to false to disable equality checks, or provide a custom comparator.
returns_getter: getter(): reads the current value and registers a dependency when called inside a tracking scope
returns_setter: setter(value): updates the value. Accepts a direct value or a function (prev) => next.
tip_equality: By default, signals use === comparison. Setting the same value again won't trigger re-computation.
